final_rules.instructions: Deploy at paranoia level 1. Targets the specific double-URL-encode bypass pattern %25xx (which decodes to %xx). Catches payloads like %253C (->%3C-><). Three or more consecutive encoded chars required to suppress false positives on legitimate double-encoded content.
final_rules.refinement_notes: New focused rule replacing the overly broad rule 900004. Targets the concrete bypass mechanism: %25 followed by hex digits appearing in chains of 3+, covering %253CSvG, %253CiFRAme, JaVasCript%253A patterns. Avoids the problematic Unicode range syntax that ModSecurity may not support reliably.
final_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:%(?:25)+(?:3[cC]|2[fF]|3[eE])|%(?:25)+[0-9a-fA-F]{2}){3,}" "id:900001,phase:2,block,status:403,t:none,msg:'XSS: Triple or higher percent-encoding (double %25 encoding chain) indicating multi-layer obfuscation',severity:'CRITICAL',tag:'attack-xss',tag:'custom'"

final_rules.instructions: Core blocking rule applied after triple URL decode and double HTML entity decode. Covers , etc. Apply to all user-supplied input. Recommended action: BLOCK.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Refined from generated rules 900001 and 900002. Reduced redundant transforms (3x urlDecodeUni is the maximum useful depth for observed payloads). Tightened quantifiers with {0,300} bound on tag internals to prevent catastrophic backtracking. Removed duplicate t:urlDecodeUni listed three times in original which was syntactically redundant - kept as three separate transforms which is how ModSecurity chains them. Merged overlapping patterns from 900001/900002 into one precise rule.

final_rules.instructions: Catches standalone javascript: URI patterns not inside HTML tags, covering JaVasCript%253AaLeRT payloads after triple decode. The leading boundary assertion prevents matching mid-word tokens. Recommended action: BLOCK.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Extracted from 900001/900003. Isolated the javascript: URI pattern as a separate rule to keep regex complexity manageable and allow independent tuning. Boundary assertion [\s'"`=:(;,] or ^ prevents false positives on substrings. Triple urlDecodeUni + double htmlEntityDecode covers all observed encoding depths.
final_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:^|[\s'"`=:(;,])javascript[\t\n\r ]*:" "id:900003,phase:2,block,status:403,t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:compressWhitespace,t:lowercase,msg:'XSS: bare javascript: URI scheme after decode',severity:'CRITICAL',tag:'attack-xss',tag:'custom'"

final_rules.instructions: Catch-all for alert(1), confirm(), prompt() after full normalization. Complements tag-based rules by targeting the execution sink directly. Recommended action: BLOCK.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Refined from generated rule 900005. Removed location=javascript: (covered by rule 900003). Tightened argument pattern to [0-9'"]{0,20} to reduce false positives while still matching alert(1), alert('xss') etc. Removed removeComments transform (not needed here). Kept triple decode chain.
final_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\(\s*[0-9'"]{0,20}\s*\)" "id:900004,phase:2,block,status:403,t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:compressWhitespace,t:lowercase,msg:'XSS: JS execution primitive (alert/confirm/prompt) with argument after decode',severity:'CRITICAL',tag:'attack-xss',tag:'custom'"

final_rules.instructions: High-confidence correlation rule requiring tag + event/uri handler + execution sink in same value. Very low false positive rate. Covers <svg/onLoad=alErt(1)>, <iframe src=javascript:alert(1)>. Recommended action: BLOCK.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Refined from generated rule 900006. Bounded all wildcard quantifiers to prevent ReDoS. Removed the .* between segments and replaced with bounded [^>]{0,500} and [\s\S]{0,200}. This is the most targeted of the rules and should produce near-zero false positives.

final_rules.instructions: Detection-only telemetry rule for the fullwidth Unicode payloads (FF01-FF5E range covers fullwidth ASCII, 0400-045F covers Cyrillic homoglyphs, 2160-217F covers Roman numerals used as lookalikes). ModSecurity cannot normalize Unicode confusables, so this rule LOGs and scores rather than blocks. Tune and promote to block after establishing a baseline. Recommended action: LOG+SCORE initially.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Replaces generated rule 900008. Uses explicit Unicode ranges matching the actual bypass payloads (fullwidth ％１２３, Cyrillic С/с/А/а/Е/е, Roman numeral ⅼ/ⅼ). Simplified from the complex mixed-pattern regex. Action changed to log+pass+score to avoid false positives since legitimate Unicode content is common.
final_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:[\uff01-\uff5e\u0400-\u045f\u2160-\u217f]){6,}" "id:900006,phase:2,log,pass,t:none,msg:'ANOMALY: fullwidth Unicode or Cyrillic/Roman numeral homoglyphs detected - possible encoding evasion',severity:'NOTICE',tag:'attack-xss',tag:'custom',setvar:'tx.anomaly_score=+1'"

generated_rules.instructions: Primary blocking rule for normalized XSS payloads. Covers double/triple URL-encoding, entity encoding, mixed case, and common dangerous tags with event handlers or javascript: URIs. Recommended action: BLOCK.
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: High-confidence raw signature rule for classic reflected/stored XSS patterns seen in the bypass set. Recommended action: BLOCK.
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: Detects comment-injected javascript: and inline event handlers invoking common script sinks. This addresses payloads like JavAS/*%20*/criPt:. Recommended action: BLOCK.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:java\s*/\*.*?\*/\s*script|java\s*script)\s*:|(?:on[a-z]{3,32})\s*=\s*['\"]?\s*(?:alert|confirm|prompt|eval|settimeout|setinterval|location\s*=)" "id:900003,phase:2,block,status:403,severity:CRITICAL,msg:'XSS: obfuscated javascript scheme or event handler execution sink',t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:removeComments,t:compressWhitespace,t:lowercase"
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: Anomaly rule for repeated percent-encoding and stacked HTML entities commonly used to hide XSS payloads. Generalized for multi-layer encoding abuse. Recommended action: BLOCK in high-security mode; LOG if the application legitimately transports heavily encoded content.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:%25(?:2[0-9a-f]|3[cCeE]|4[67]|5[bBdD]|[0-9a-f]{2})){4,}|(?:&#(?:x0*3[cCeE]|0*47|0*60|0*62|0*34|0*39|\d{2,5});){2,}" "id:900004,phase:2,deny,status:403,severity:ERROR,msg:'Anomaly: excessive multi-layer encoding consistent with XSS obfuscation',t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:lowercase"

generated_rules.instructions: Catches direct execution primitives after normalization, including alert/confirm/prompt and location=javascript:. Recommended action: BLOCK.
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: Correlation rule requiring both a dangerous markup/context indicator and an execution primitive, reducing false positives while preserving broad variant coverage. Recommended action: BLOCK.
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: Targets encoded attribute assignments and encoded tag openings, including samples like onclick%253D and entity-encoded angle brackets. Recommended action: BLOCK.

Detection-only telemetry rule for payloads mixing non-ASCII characters with encoding layers, useful against homoglyph/fullwidth evasion. ModSecurity lacks full Unicode confusable normalization, so this rule should be used to LOG and tune before promotion to blocking.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)[\x{0080}-\x{FFFF}]{4,}.*(?:%25|&#)|(?:%25|&#).*[\x{0080}-\x{FFFF}]{4,}" "id:900008,phase:2,log,pass,severity:NOTICE,msg:'Anomaly: mixed Unicode and encoded data requiring review',t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:lowercase"

generated_rules.instructions: Focused javascript: URI rule for anchor and iframe contexts. Includes a narrow negative lookahead to avoid trivial javascript:void(0) patterns if those are legitimately used by the application. Recommended action: BLOCK unless such URIs are required, in which case restrict scope carefully.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)(?:<\s*a\b[^>]{0,256}\bhref\s*=\s*['\"]?\s*javascript\s*:)(?!void\s*\(\s*0\s*\))|(?:<\s*iframe\b[^>]{0,256}\bsrc\s*=\s*['\"]?\s*javascript\s*:)" "id:900009,phase:2,deny,status:403,severity:CRITICAL,msg:'XSS: active javascript URI in anchor or iframe',t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:compressWhitespace,t:lowercase"
validation_warnings: No actions block found (ok for chained rules)

generated_rules.instructions: High-confidence gadget rule for auto-triggered handlers in img/svg/body tags, directly covering the observed onerror/onload bypasses. Recommended action: BLOCK.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|ARGS_NAMES|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS|XML:/*|REQUEST_BODY "@rx (?i)<\s*img\b[^>]{0,256}\bsrc\s*=\s*[^>]{0,128}\bonerror\s*=|<\s*svg\b[^>]{0,256}\bonload\s*=|<\s*body\b[^>]{0,256}\bonload\s*=" "id:900010,phase:2,deny,status:403,severity:CRITICAL,msg:'XSS: auto-executing event handler in common gadget tag',t:none,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:urlDecodeUni,t:htmlEntityDecode,t:compressWhitespace,t:lowercase"
